about.title: Learning that feels rigorous, human, and connected to real life.
about.text: Zion International School is designed for families who want academic strength without losing warmth, creativity, and personal attention. Students learn through clear instruction, thoughtful projects, and meaningful community life.

hero.text: Zion International School blends strong academics, caring teachers, and enriching activities so every child grows with confidence and character.
